# Legacy PowerPoint fixtures

`file-example-250kb.ppt` is the real-world PowerPoint 97–2003 fixture supplied for the
legacy viewer regression test. Its SHA-256 digest is
`1e4f6b07f0147358b4e6096d70ea7b1fb6d88bab18b2fb2a1b580185024ed158`.

The deck contains three slides and exercises text, drawing objects, an image, a chart,
and a table. Tests intentionally open the original OLE/MS-PPT file rather than converting
it to PPTX first.
